description: Parse ESE page header flags from raw page bytes
steps: Call EsePage::parse_header on a buffer with known flag bytes at the correct offset
Verify page_flags field matches the expected value
Verify leaf/branch/root flag constants are defined and usable

description: Parse previous and next page links from ESE page header
steps: Call EsePage::parse_header on a buffer with known prev_page and next_page values
Verify prev_page field matches the encoded value
Verify next_page field matches the encoded value

description: Page header parse fails gracefully on short buffer
steps: Call EsePage::parse_header on a buffer shorter than the 40-byte page header
Verify the call returns Err (not a panic)
